R07Coastal Transect / Plot 31Fictional canopy regeneration survey
p5.js · pixel-seeded recursion
Human-grown forest

Let every habitat choose its branches.

Hover to inspect a plot. Drag right to advance growth; drag vertically to bend the prevailing wind.

Branches—
Verdict—
